data.description:
Static safety checks beyond JSON Schema.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Reference-integrity linter: every inputs.X resolves to a real upstream output; one terminal step; located errors.
- [ ] Closed expression allow-list; forbid raw ${{}} in prompt/command fields; re-validate the post-substitution document.
- [ ] Secret scan (gitleaks-style) on .rebar/workflows/*.yaml as a blocking gate; require secrets.* / ${env:VAR} indirection.
Files: src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint.py
data.title: WS-B2: Reference-integrity linter + expression allow-list + secret scan
